zh.lifeSummary: 當Friedrich VI von Leiningen於1288年出生在法國洛萊莫瑟勒達保時，他的父親Friedrich V von Leiningen12歲，母親Sophie von Freiburg19歲。他和Jutta von Isenburg-Limburg至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1342年7月21日在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 巴德 迪可海姆阿爾特萊寧根賀寧根享年54歲，埋葬在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇庫爾斯騰圖姆 普法爾茲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Friedrich VI von Leiningen于1288年出生在法国洛萊莫瑟勒達保时，他的父亲Friedrich V von Leiningen12岁，母亲Sophie von Freiburg19岁。他和Jutta von Isenburg-Limburg至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1342年7月21日在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 巴德 迪可海姆阿爾特萊寧根賀寧根享年54岁，埋葬在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇庫爾斯騰圖姆 普法爾茲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Leiningen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from any of several places called Leiningen.

nameMeanings.name: Friedrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

variants.name: Frederick
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

variants.name: Friederich
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

nameMeanings.name: VI
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Friedrich VI von Leiningen was born in 1288, in Dabo, Moselle, Lorraine, France, his father, Friedrich V von Leiningen, was 12 and his mother, Sophie von Freiburg, was 19. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Jutta von Isenburg-Limburg. He died on 21 July 1342, in Höningen, Altleiningen, Bad Dürkheim, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, at the age of 54, and was buried in Palatinate, Holy Roman Empire.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Friedrich VI von Leiningen est né en 1288, à Dabo, Moselle, Lorraine, France, son père, Friedrich V von Leiningen, avait 12 ans et sa mère, Sophie von Freiburg, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Jutta von Isenburg-Limburg. Il est décédé le 21 juillet 1342, à Höningen, Altleiningen, Landkreis Bad Dürkheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Kurfürstentum Pfalz, Saint-Empire romain.

de.lifeSummary: Als Friedrich VI von Leiningen 1288 in Dabo, Mosel, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Friedrich V von Leiningen 12 und seine Mutter Sophie von Freiburg 19. Er hatte mit Jutta von Isenburg-Limburg mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 21. Juli 1342 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Höningen, Altleiningen, Landkreis Bad Dürkheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland und wurde in Kurfürstentum Pfalz, Heiliges Römisches Reich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Friedrich VI von Leiningen è nato il nel 1288 nel Dabo, Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, il suo padre, Friedrich V von Leiningen, aveva 12 anni e il suo madre, Sophie von Freiburg, aveva 19 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Jutta von Isenburg-Limburg. Morì il 21 luglio 1342, nel Höningen, Altleiningen, Landkreis Bad Dürkheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Kurfürstentum Pfalz, Heiliges Römisches Reich.

ja.lifeSummary: Friedrich VI von Leiningenが1288年にフランスロレィヌモセルダボで生まれた時，父Friedrich V von Leiningenは12歳，母Sophie von Freiburgは19歳であった。彼はJutta von Isenburg-Limburgとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1342年7月21日にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス バド ドuルクヘイムアルトレイニンジェンhoニンジェンで54歳で死去し，ヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチクルフuルステントゥム プファルズにて埋葬された。

ko.Höningen, Altleiningen, Palatinate, Bava: 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 바드 드u르케임 알틀레이닝 ho닝
ko.lifeSummary: Friedrich VI von Leiningen(이)가 1288년 프랑스 로레이인 모셀 다보에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Friedrich V von Leiningen(은)는 12세였고, 그의 어머니 Sophie von Freiburg(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Jutta von Isenburg-Limburg(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1342년 7월 21일 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 바드 드u르케임 알틀레이닝 ho닝에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 커프u르스투 파알즈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Friedrich VI von Leiningen nasceu em 1288, em Dabo, Moselle, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Friedrich V von Leiningen, tinha 12 anos e sua mãe, Sophie von Freiburg, tinha 19 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Jutta von Isenburg-Limburg. Ele faleceu em 21 de julho de 1342, em Höningen, Altleiningen, Landkreis Bad Dürkheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Kurfürstentum Pfalz, Heiliges Römisches Reich.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Friedrich VI von Leiningen родился в 1288 г. в местности дабо, моселл, лорреаин, Франция, его отцу по имени Friedrich V von Leiningen было 12 лет, а матери, которую звали Sophie von Freiburg, 19. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Jutta von Isenburg-Limburg. Он умер 21 июля 1342 г. в местности хoнинген, алтлининген, ландкрис бад дuрхим, раинланд-пфалз, Германия в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности курфuрстентум пфалз, хилигесь рoмищесь раич.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Jutta von Isenburg-Limburg. Murió el 21 de julio de 1342, en Höningen, Altleiningen, Landkreis Bad Dürkheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Kurfürstentum Pfalz, Heiliges Römisches Reich.
